channel.title: INsmh
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INsmh, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fmr. Manager of DOD Aerospace Threat Program: “UFOs are Real”
item.description: Something extraordinary was revealed today. Former high-level officials and scientists with deep black experience who have

item.title: Claims of ‘rediscovered’ Michelangelos unsettle Renaissance experts
Florida coach Jon Sumrall’s photoshoot with a 7-foot alligator includes some tense moments
Blaring horn after a power surge delays Pistons and Cavaliers in 3rd quarter
Heroic Chihuahua Helps Swiss Rescuers Find Man Who Fell Into Glacier
item.description: The furry Chihuahua paced atop an Alpine rock after its owner fell into a crevasse, allowing rescuers to locate the man.

item.title: Punch the orphan macaque is outgrowing his plushie and making friends
Crocodile caught in an Australian creek 1,200 miles from its tropical habitat
Snake Sneaks Onto Plane And Delays A Flight In Australia
item.description: The 2-foot green tree snake was found Tuesday in the plane's cargo hold as passengers were boarding a Virgin Australia flight in Melbourne.

item.title: Singapore’s Vampire Turns 60, Still Shocks the World with His Youthful Looks
item.description: Chuando Tan is a Singaporean photographer whose name is constantly making headlines for looking decades younger than his actual age. The post Singapor...

item.title: Big Boy Toys – Mini Sports Cars Designed for Adults Are Just as Exilharating as the Full-Size Models
item.description: Chinese art Studio S.T.A.Y. Automotive creates "junior" models of iconic sports cars that are just as thrilling to drive as their inspiration. The pos...

item.title: Russian Man Leaves Window Open for Three Years, Finds Apartment Invaded by Pigeons
item.description: A Russian man came back to his apartment three years after leaving for work, only to find it covered in a thick layer of pigeon droppings and feathers...

item.title: Nostradamus prediction sparks World War 3 fears as Iran war escalates
Inside the mannequin graveyard: Creepy former RAF base which is home to 15,000 figures
item.description: Many of the figures have starred in TV and film after being rescued from landfill sites

item.title: Scientists Create Genetically Altered Tomato That Smells Like Butter-Flavored Popcorn
item.description: A team of researchers from China and Australia recently created the first aromatic tomato that emits a "delightful popcorn-like" aroma. The post Scien...

item.title: In a World First, a Chinese Robot Successfully Performed Repairs on a 10 kV Powerline
item.description: A revolutionary robot electrician recently performed repairs on a 10 kV powerline in China's Hubei Province, replacing human electricians for the firs...

item.title: New dinosaur from 95,000,000 years ago may have been ‘first dragon’
item.description: Spinosaurus mirabilis could have been mistaken for something out of Game of Thrones

item.title: Trump ordering release of secret alien files ‘could be distraction from controversies’
item.description: 'The timing is fascinating and raises questions,' a UFO expert said.

item.title: Man who looks like Jeffrey Epstein says his life is a misery
